subject: Seel — pale seal-like Pokemon with a horn on its forehead, sitting contentedly against a snowy or icy blue-white background
description: A pale, rounded seal-like creature sits centered in the frame against a light blue-white background suggesting ice or snow. The creature has a smooth body, a short upward-curving horn or spike on its forehead, and small dark eyes with a content expression. Its flippers rest at its sides. The color palette is almost entirely cool whites and pale blues, giving the image a cold, wintry feeling. The composition is simple and centered with nothing else visible in the scene.
foreground: pale rounded seal-like creature with forehead horn and content expression
background: pale blue-white gradient suggesting icy or snowy environment
